answer:
The Wagnerian Plaid dress was sold before the Woggle-Bug could buy it, then passed through the second-hand market to various owners. The Bug pursued the dress as it was worn by different women, but he ultimately only obtained a necktie made from its fabric. He reconciled himself to keeping this necktie as his love forever.

\boxed{\text{The dress was sold, passed through the second-hand market, and the Woggle-Bug only obtained a necktie made from its fabric.}}
